items.question: Are these vouchers really free?
items.answer: Yes! All vouchers on Cashog are completely free to use. Just copy the code and paste at checkout.

items.question: How do I use a voucher code?
items.answer: Copy the voucher code, go to the store's website, add items to your cart, and paste the code in the 'Promo Code' or 'Discount Code' box at checkout.

items.question: Do vouchers expire?
items.answer: Yes, most vouchers have an expiry date. Check the expiry date shown on each voucher. Use them before they expire!

items.question: How often are new vouchers added?
items.answer: New vouchers are added daily. We update our database constantly to bring you the latest deals and discounts.

items.question: Can I use vouchers with other offers?
items.answer: It depends on the store. Some allow stacking with sales, others don't. Always check the terms and conditions.

items.question: What if a voucher doesn't work?
items.answer: Vouchers occasionally expire faster than expected. Try another code or check the terms. Report invalid codes and we'll remove them.

items.question: Do I need to create an account to use vouchers?
items.answer: No! All vouchers are accessible without an account. However, creating a free account lets you save favorite codes and get alerts for new vouchers.

items.question: Are the vouchers valid in my country?
items.answer: Most vouchers are valid in {country}. Check the voucher details for any regional restrictions before using.
